zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Wilbraham, III Lord of Woodhey於大約1409年出生在英國爾比可黑阿德時，他的父親Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey19歲，母親Margaret Golborne21歲。他於1432年與Margaret Swetenham在英國英格蘭爾比可黑阿德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1492年在英國英格蘭梅瑟希德維拉爾比可黑阿德享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Wilbraham, III Lord of Woodhey于大约1409年出生在英国爾比可黑阿德时，他的父亲Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey19岁，母亲Margaret Golborne21岁。他于1432年与Margaret Swetenham在英国英格兰爾比可黑阿德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1492年在英国英格兰梅瑟希德維拉爾比可黑阿德享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wilbraham,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Wilbraham (Cambridgeshire). The placename derives from the Old English female personal name Wilburg + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Wilbraham, III Lord of Woodhey was born about 1409, in Birkenhead, Cheshire, England, his father, Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey, was 19 and his mother, Margaret Golborne, was 21. He married Margaret Swetenham in 1432, in Birkenhead, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died about 1492, in Birkenhead, Wirral, Merseyside, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Wilbraham, III Lord of Woodhey est né environ 1409, à Birkenhead, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margaret Golborne, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Swetenham en 1432, à Birkenhead, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé environ 1492, à Birkenhead, Wirral, Merseyside, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans.

Er hat 1432 in Birkenhead, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Swetenham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb um 1492 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Birkenhead, Wirral, Merseyside, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Wilbraham, III Lord of Woodheyが約1409年にイギリスチェシュアイアバーケンヘドで生まれた時，父Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodheyは19歳，母Margaret Golborneは21歳であった。1432年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアバーケンヘドでMargaret Swetenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は約1492年にイギリスイギリスメルセイシドウィラルバーケンヘドで85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Wilbraham, III Lord of Woodhey(이)가 대략 1409년 영국 체실르 비르켄헤드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Golborne(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1432년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 비르켄헤드에서 Margaret Swetenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1492년 영국 잉글랜드 머세이시드 위럴 비르켄헤드에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret Swetenham em 1432, em Birkenhead, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Wilbraham, III Lord of Woodhey родился около 1409 г. в местности биркенид, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Golborne, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Swetenham в 1432 г. в местности биркенид, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер около 1492 г. в местности биркенид, вирраль, мирсисид, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет.
